hibernate-mapping.query: Select ce From com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyEvent as ce, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyEventDetail as ed1, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyEventDetail as ed2 Where ce.Company = :company and ce.EventTypeCd = :eventTypeCode and ce.StatusCd = :companyEventStatus and ed1.Company = :company and ed1.CompanyEvent = ce and ed2.Company = :company and ed2.CompanyEvent = ed1.CompanyEvent and ed1.EventDetailTypeCd = :eventDetailTypeCode1 and ed1.Value = :value1 and ed2.EventDetailTypeCd = :eventDetailTypeCode2 and ed2.Value = :value2
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT distinct ce.creator_id as creator, au.first_name as firstName, au.last_name as lastName FROM psp_company_event ce LEFT JOIN psp_auth_user au on ce.creator_id = au.CORP_ID WHERE ce.company_fk = :companyId
